result: I would dissolve the illusion of separation—the false belief that any being exists in isolation from the rest of existence. This includes the divides between self and other, human and nature, mind and world. The root of almost every cruelty, exploitation, and despair is the conviction that we are fundamentally separate, competing selves. If that perceptual boundary shattered, the motivation to harm would evaporate, because harming another would be felt as directly as harming one's own body.
